backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that provides a search function by making HTTP outcalls to DuckDuckGo's API with URL-encoded queries and returning JSON results via a transform function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features for rendering URLs as clickable links in SearchInterface.tsx that open in the same tab.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the search interface, hooks, styling, and URL formatting utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using neutral grayscale values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React app with a root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface within a full-height flex container.
Complete search UI component with form input, loading states, error handling, and results display that parses JSON from backend and renders abstracts and related topics with auto-linkified URLs opening in the same tab.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with optional Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that manages search state (results, loading, error) and calls the backend actor's search method with URL-encoded queries, validating JSON responses.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS with custom OKLCH color system using warm coral/orange primary and deep teal accent colors for light and dark modes, plus fadeIn animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility functions that detect URLs in text using regex and convert them to clickable anchor tags (opening in same tab) as React JSX nodes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines a custom design system with OKLCH color variables, extended theme settings including container, border radius, shadows, fonts, and accordion animations, plus typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a custom search application showing 6 completed features (search interface, visual design, search functionality fixes, URL rendering) and 3 pending feature requests (backend API integration, DuckDuckGo HTTP outcalls verification, clickable URLs).
